_meta.description: Weight profiles for the multi-objective optimization engine. Each profile defines how the four scoring dimensions are blended into the final recommendation score.
_meta.formula: final_score = w_sustainability * sustainability + w_cost * cost + w_time * time + w_convenience * convenience
_meta.constraint: Sum of weights in every profile must equal 1.0

balanced.label: Balanced
balanced.description: Default profile aligned with the documented scoring philosophy.

eco_priority.label: Eco Priority
eco_priority.description: Maximizes sustainability while still respecting basic real-world constraints.

budget_priority.label: Budget Priority
budget_priority.description: Cost-sensitive users. Sustainability still influences ranking but is secondary.

speed_priority.label: Speed Priority
speed_priority.description: Urgent decisions where time dominates. Used selectively to avoid greenwashing fast options.

cost.notes: Cost is inverted before weighting so all dimensions are higher-is-better.
